products.name: 50HFE
products.descriptor: 50cc single-cylinder heavy-fuel UAV engine, 3.6 hp, ~340 g/kWh, FlexDI™ integrated

evidence.snippet:
50HFE
50cc Single-Cylinder FlexDI™ Fully Integrated HFE Propulsion System for UAVs

**3.6 hp and ~340 g/kWh** cruise efficiency for small airframes. Proven with 250,000+ hours,
plus Engine Management System driven in/post-flight diagnostics to keep missions on schedule.

products.name: 75HFE
products.descriptor: 75cc single-cylinder heavy-fuel UAV engine, 5.1 hp, ~345 g/kWh, FlexDI™ integrated

evidence.snippet:
75HFE
75cc Single-Cylinder FlexDI™ Fully Integrated HFE Propulsion System for UAVs

Built for endurance, the 75HFE uses FlexDI™ to deliver efficient heavy-fuel combustion
with minimal vibration and simplified integration. Field-proven with over 700,000+ hours
of multiple operating environments across the globe.

products.name: 150HFE
products.descriptor: 150cc opposed twin-cylinder heavy-fuel UAV engine, 11.9 hp, <340 g/kWh, MIL-STD-810H qualified

evidence.snippet:
150HFE
150cc Opposed two cylinder 2-stroke FlexDI™ Fully Integrated HFE Propulsion System for UAVs

Built on the proven 75cc architecture, the 150cc twin-boxer HFE delivers ultra-smooth
heavy-fuel power - **11.9 hp, <340 g/kWh efficiency in a 10.4 kg system**.
Qualified to MIL-STD-810H and proven through 25,000 operational hours in the field.

products.name: 350HFE
products.descriptor: 350cc opposed twin-cylinder heavy-fuel UAV engine, 28.4 hp, ~325 g/kWh, Group 3 capable

evidence.snippet:
350HFE
350cc Opposed boxer twin cylinder 2-stroke FlexDI™ Fully Integrated HFE Propulsion System for UAVs

High-output endurance propulsion for larger airframes and harsher environments.
Engineered for endurance, higher onboard electrical supply and missions that demand range and payload.

products.name: PMS
products.descriptor: UAV power management system with dual 28 V outputs, alternator/battery/shore auto-switching, and CANbus telemetry

evidence.snippet:
ORBITAL PMS
Advanced Power Management System

**It keeps your UAV’s critical systems powered.
Cleanly, continuously, and intelligently
‍**Orbital’s PMS conditions and prioritises power, automatically switches between alternator / battery / shore, protects the avionics bus, and reports health via telemetry, so missions continue even when supply or load changes.

products.name: FlexECU™
products.descriptor: UAV engine management system with black-box logging, fault monitoring, anti-stall, and CAN communication

evidence.snippet:
FlexECU™
========
Advanced Engine Management System
=================================
Intelligent electronic propulsion management system

~5.2kg Integrated Propulsion System (includes ECU, mount, pumps, harness, propeller)
Engine Management
Orbital FlexECU with CAN Communication

products.name: FlexDI™
products.descriptor: Air-assisted direct fuel injection system atomising to ~8 µm droplets for heavy-fuel UAV engines

evidence.snippet:
FlexDI™ air-assisted direct injection system
At Orbital UAV, combustion efficiency begins with precise fuel atomisation
Validated through three times FAR 33.49 150-hour endurance testing and MIL-STD-810H qualification, FlexDI™ delivers reliable power when it matters most.

products.name: FlexECU® Argon
products.descriptor: Advanced variant engine management system with improved fuelling algorithms under electrical load and black-box logging

evidence.snippet: CANbus real-time telemetry; with FlexECU® Argon, get improved fuelling algorithms under electrical load, fault/diagnostics monitoring, and black-box logging.

products.name: OptiProp
products.descriptor: In-house engine and propeller simulation platform for UAV performance optimisation across altitudes and environments

evidence.snippet:
Built for Extreme UAV Performance: OptiProp
===========================================

Rapidly iterates aircraft designs in early development
Selects the ideal propeller to realise best-in-class fuel efficiency
Minimises physical testing from months to hoursIncorporates predictive fuel consumption into engineering decisions

products.name: FlexDT™
products.descriptor: Orbital remote-start device integrated with the PMS for UAV engine ground operations

evidence.snippet: IP55-targeted sealed unit with IP68 fans for in-fuselage mounting; –10 to +50 °C ambient, 2200–7500 RPM alternator range, up to 30 A rectified input. Remote start from Orbital’s FlexDT™

unresolved_questions: FlexDT™ appears only once in corpus (PMS page, line 33) as the device enabling remote engine start; no dedicated product page exists — its exact category (ground control terminal vs. vehicle-mounted device) and readiness are unverifiable from the corpus alone.
FlexECU® Argon appears only once in corpus (PMS page, line 29) as a PMS companion module offering improved fuelling algorithms; no dedicated page found, so readiness remains unknown.

OptiProp is described as an in-house simulation platform used with customers for propeller selection; it is unclear whether it is sold as a standalone software product or only delivered as an engineering service.

The five HFE product brochures (PDF) were crawled but skipped as out-of-scope (hosted on cdn.prod.website-files.com); these may contain additional detail on FlexDT, FlexECU Argon, and NDAA/compliance status.

fetch_requests.reason: HFE brochure PDFs may contain detailed specs for FlexDT, FlexECU Argon, NDAA compliance claims, and OptiProp commercial terms not present on the website pages.
PMS brochure PDF likely contains full specs for FlexDT and FlexECU Argon integration, and may include compliance/NDAA claims.
